item.title: mlverney: Michael Verney @mlverney · 8min The art of defending - this is class from Adam Hogan! Cita Ray Boyne @AnalysisGaa · 16h
item.description: Michael Verney @mlverney · 8min The art of defending - this is class from Adam Hogan! Cita Ray Boyne @AnalysisGaa · 16h A block that sums it up. Clare Waterford Relentless work rate. Honest effort. Every ball contested. For 70+ minutes, both teams emptied themselves. That’s championship hurling. 4 269

item.title:
RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 1h Dean Rock: Dublin didn't get performance 'we would have liked'
The Dubs narrowly avoided suffering
item.description:
RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 1h Dean Rock: Dublin didn't get performance 'we would have liked'
The Dubs narrowly avoided suffering a first-ever championship defeat to Wicklow, Paddy Small's 58th minute goal proving crucial. De rte.ie 2 2 mil

item.title:
RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 1h Patrick Horgan predicts early end to Tipperary title defence
"I would give Waterford a better chan
item.description:
RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 1h Patrick Horgan predicts early end to Tipperary title defence
"I would give Waterford a better chance than Tipp of going through at the moment." De rte.ie 2 1 3 mil

item.title:
TomasORuanaidh: Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 9h It'll be a fun week on the #GAA beat.
Recording The Football Pod Monday morning w/ Ja
item.description:
Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 9h It'll be a fun week on the #GAA beat.
Recording The Football Pod Monday morning w/ James & Paddy
Ep. 2 of our brand new Gaelic Football Power Rankings show with Harvey Norman is out Tuesday
Also presenting @offtheball , 7-10pm, Tuesday night all of that and plenty more 1 1 9 1 mil
